name: HWR_GOAL_F
description: The goal table stores wellness user fitness goals.

columns.Name: GOAL_ID
columns.Comments: This is column stores unique goal ID field

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This column used to store the id of communication source.

columns.Name: CONVERSATION_ID
columns.Comments: This column used to store the id of conversation.

columns.Name: GOAL_METRIC
columns.Comments: This is column stores the metric of the goal.

columns.Name: LOWER_BOUND
columns.Comments: This stores the lower bound of the goal metric.

columns.Name: UPPER_BOUND
columns.Comments: This stores the upper bound value for the Goal Metric

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: UNITS
columns.Comments: This stores the units to be used for reading the goals

columns.Name: FREQUENCY
columns.Comments: This stores the frequency of the wellness user data goal.

columns.Name: GOAL_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is column stores the goal type.

columns.Name: CATEGORY
columns.Comments: This column shows whether this goal is wellness program goal or user goal.

columns.Name: GOAL_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the name associated with the goal being represented.

columns.Name: PARTICIPATION_RATE_TARGET
columns.Comments: This column stores the target participation rate.

columns.Name: REWARD_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the reward id for the corresponding goal.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
